title: malcolmia lacera var. patula
intro: Malcolmia lacera var. patula is a plant species also known as the 'wild cress' or 'tender cress', belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of glucosinolates. The health benefits of Malcolmia lacera var. patula include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
